creator: eugene@hutorny.in.ua
text:
I agree with the issue reporter and support his proposal on hiding legacy time zones.
Those legacy time zones (Europe/Uzhgorod, Europe/Zaporozhye, Europe/Simferopol) were introduced by the local authorities and were cancelled by the government in 1992 and 1995 by the resolutions of Cabinet of Ministers: #139 dated 1992/03/20, and #509 dated 1996/05/13.

Having these TZ options now is really confusing.
